message:
test(readme): to_datetime_with_format/unit/options functional coverage

3 datetime parsing variants in the prelude but previously only name-
checked in the compile guard. A regression in any of the parsing paths
would not have been caught.

Adds readme_datetime_helpers_round_trip — reachable via prelude
alone — that exercises:

- to_datetime_with_format(&str_series, Some("%Y-%m-%d")) on
  ["2024-01-15", "2024-02-20"] → 2 non-null parsed values
- to_datetime_with_unit(&epoch_series, "s") on Int64 seconds-since-
  epoch values → 2 non-null parsed values
- to_datetime_with_options(&str_series, format + utc=true) → 2
  non-null parsed values

Each path asserts shape preservation (len=2) plus the first parsed
value is non-Null (proves the parsing actually executed end-to-end,
not just that the call returned).

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.46.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
